name: hb_7_29
requirements: As part of your analysis, for station 272 on 2025-07-05 compute and store: mean_pm25, max_pm25, mean_aqi (float), exceedance_hours (PM2.5>75, int), peak_pm25_hour_of_day (0-23, int).

turns.query: Analyze pollution source attribution for high PM2.5 episodes at Railway station (station_id: 272) during 2025-07-05, considering upstream wind patterns and nearby emission sources.
